mealprep.title: Let's meal plan!
mealprep.subtitle: Our goal: minimize grocery runs to 1 trip a month
mealprep.body: We designed a monthly meal plan so every ingredient is used before it expires — no waste, no extra trips.

mealprep.title: We have 1 option for
mealprep.subtitle: Breakfast or a Snack
mealprep.body: If you get bored, swap apples for other fruits (like pears, peaches, or mango!). These recipes are remixable, so you never get bored.

recipes.name: One Pan Brown Sugar Apple Muffins

mealprep.title: We have 2 options for
mealprep.subtitle: Lunch or Dinner
mealprep.body: If you get bored, swap chicken for other proteins (like tofu, turkey, or shrimp!). These recipes are remixable, so you never get bored.

mealprep.title: Muffins: bake once, eat all week
mealprep.subtitle: Bake for 40 min on Sunday → Get 14 muffins → Eat 2 muffins a day × 7 days

mealprep.title: Casserole 🥘 & Fajitas 🥙: bake twice, eat all week
mealprep.subtitle: Bake 45 min on Sun + Wed → Get 2 batches → Each lasts 3–4 days

mealprep.title: Weekly cook time: just 90 mins
mealprep.subtitle: We're lazy — so we bake in parallel
mealprep.body: Muffins and casserole can bake at the same time on Sundays — overlapping bake times means less time in the kitchen.

mealprep.title: They're all one-pan, dump-and-bake recipes!
mealprep.subtitle: Minimal dishes to wash, minimal cooking ability
mealprep.body: Just chop, dump, and bake — less cleanup, less stress.

steps.title: 🧁 Step 1: Grocery Shop!
steps.subtitle: We need 10 items in total

steps.title: 🧁 Step 1: Grocery Shop!
steps.subtitle: Which comes out to $49.10 (4 batches!)

steps.title: Step 2: Preheat the oven
steps.subtitle: to 375°F (190°C)
steps.body: Set your oven to 375°F before you do anything else so it's ready when you need it.

steps.title: Step 3: Grease a 14-cup muffin tin
steps.subtitle: or line with paper cups
steps.body: Spray each cup with non-stick spray, or drop in paper liners.

steps.title: Step 4: Make the flour mixture
steps.subtitle: Stir together in a large bowl
steps.body: 2¼ cups flour · 1 tsp baking soda · ½ tsp salt

steps.title: Step 5: Make the brown sugar mixture
steps.subtitle: Stir in a separate bowl until sugar dissolves
steps.body: 1½ cups brown sugar · 1 cup buttermilk · 3 tbsp butter · 1 egg · 1 tsp vanilla

steps.title: Step 6: Combine
steps.subtitle: Pour wet mixture into flour mixture
steps.body: Stir until just combined — don't overmix.

steps.title: Step 7: Add the apples
steps.subtitle: Dice apples and fold them in
steps.body: Peel and dice your apples into small cubes, then stir them into the batter.

steps.title: Step 8: Fill the muffin tin
steps.subtitle: Spoon batter into each cup, filling to the top
steps.body: Use a spoon or ice cream scoop for even filling.

steps.title: Step 9: Make the topping
steps.subtitle: Stir together in a small bowl
steps.body: ½ cup brown sugar · ⅓ cup flour · 2 tbsp butter · cinnamon to taste

steps.title: Step 10: Add the topping
steps.subtitle: Sprinkle mixture on top of muffins
steps.body: Use your fingers to crumble the topping evenly over each muffin.

steps.title: Step 11: Bake!
steps.subtitle: 25 minutes
steps.body: Bake until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.

steps.title: Step 12: Serve
steps.subtitle: Enjoy as breakfast or snack!

steps.title: Step 13: If you get bored of these muffins,
steps.subtitle: you can easily use different fruits!

remix.substitutions_subheader: (these also stay in the fridge for 1 month without expiring):

steps.title: Step 1: Grocery Shop!
steps.subtitle: We need 14 items in total

steps.title: Step 1: Grocery Shop!
steps.subtitle: Still shopping...

steps.title: Step 1: Grocery Shop!
steps.subtitle: Which comes out to $113 (4 batches!)

steps.title: Step 2: Preheat the oven
steps.subtitle: to 350°F (175°C)
steps.body: Let your oven fully preheat before the casserole goes in.

steps.title: Step 3: Make the cream mixture
steps.subtitle: Stir together in a medium bowl
steps.body: 1 can cream of chicken soup · ½ cup cottage cheese · ½ cup sour cream · 4 oz cream cheese (room temp) · ½ tsp onion powder · 1½ tsp Creole seasoning · 1 tsp garlic powder

steps.title: Step 4: Add the chicken
steps.subtitle: Fold in chicken and parsley until evenly coated
steps.body: Use rotisserie pulled chicken for the easiest prep.

steps.title: Step 5: Make the cracker topping
steps.subtitle: Combine in a medium bowl
steps.body: Crackers · melted butter · remaining ½ tsp garlic powder

steps.title: Step 6: Assemble
steps.subtitle: Spoon into baking dish, top with mozzarella, then crackers
steps.body: Use an 11×7-inch or 9-inch square baking dish.

steps.title: Step 7: Bake!
steps.subtitle: About 35 minutes
steps.body: Bake until crackers are golden brown and edges are bubbly.

steps.title: Step 8: Serve
steps.subtitle: Garnish with scallions — enjoy as lunch or dinner!
steps.body: Swap the protein: turkey, tuna, or salmon all work. Add veggies: corn, broccoli, spinach, mushrooms, or peas.

steps.title: Step 1: Grocery Shop!
steps.subtitle: We need 13 items in total

steps.title: Step 1: Grocery Shop!
steps.subtitle: Grab the rest of the seasonings and protein

steps.title: Step 1: Grocery Shop!
steps.subtitle: Which comes out to $90.71 in total!!!

steps.title: Step 2: Preheat the oven
steps.subtitle: to 400°F (200°C)
steps.body: A hot oven is key for getting the peppers nicely roasted.

steps.title: Step 3: Marinate
steps.subtitle: 30 minutes to 2 hours in the fridge
steps.body: Combine oil, chili powder blend, oregano, garlic powder, onion powder, seafood spice rub, black pepper, and cayenne in a large zip-lock bag. Add chicken breast, pepper blend, and onion.

steps.title: Step 4: Spread on a sheet pan
steps.subtitle: Line with aluminum foil first
steps.body: Spread the marinated chicken and veggies in a single layer on the prepared pan.

steps.title: Step 5: Roast
steps.subtitle: 15–20 minutes, stirring halfway
steps.body: Chicken should reach 165°F internal temperature. Peppers should be softened.

steps.title: Step 6: Finish
steps.subtitle: Sprinkle cilantro and squeeze lime juice over everything
steps.body: Stir to distribute the citrus and herbs evenly.

steps.title: Step 7: Serve
steps.subtitle: Hot with warm tortillas and your favorite toppings
steps.body: Swap it up: shrimp, steak, or tofu for protein. Zucchini or mushrooms for veggies. Curry, Cajun, or jerk for a totally different spice profile.

muffins.title: Preheat the oven!
muffins.instruction: Drag the slider to set the correct temp

muffins.title: Grease the muffin tin!
muffins.instruction: Press and drag the spray across the pan to grease it
muffins.hint: Hold and drag rightward to spray across the whole pan.
muffins.feedback_correct: Nice — pan is all greased up!
muffins.feedback_wrong: Keep dragging until the whole pan is greased.

muffins.title: Make the flour mixture!
muffins.instruction: Drag the correct ingredients into the bowl
muffins.drop_placeholder: Drag ingredients here for flour mixture
muffins.hint: It's like Coca-Cola… a powder you can't bake without!
muffins.feedback_correct: You got flour, baking soda, and salt — nice work!
muffins.feedback_wrong: Almost! Check what goes in the dry mixture.

missing_hints.flour: Hint: you're missing the main pantry-staple powder — the base of the mix.
missing_hints.baking_soda: Hint: you're missing the leavening agent that helps the muffins rise.
missing_hints.salt: Hint: you're missing a tiny pinch that balances the sweetness.

muffins.title: Make the brown sugar mixture!
muffins.instruction: Drag the correct ingredients into the bowl
muffins.hint: It's a liquid — without it the brown sugar won't dissolve!
muffins.feedback_correct: Perfect — brown sugar, buttermilk, butter, egg, and vanilla!
muffins.feedback_wrong: Not quite — think about what goes in the WET mixture.

missing_hints.brown_sugar: Hint: you're missing the sweet brown sweetener.
missing_hints.buttermilk: Hint: you're missing the creamy liquid that makes it dissolve.
missing_hints.butter: Hint: you're missing the fat that makes it rich.
missing_hints.egg: Hint: you're missing the binder that holds it together.
missing_hints.vanilla: Hint: you're missing the fragrant extract for flavor.

muffins.title: Whisk the brown sugar mixture!
muffins.instruction: Mix until the sugar dissolves and we get a runny mixture!
muffins.hint: Move the whisk left and right → ← to mix
muffins.feedback_correct: Perfect — the mixture is smooth and runny!
muffins.feedback_wrong: Keep whisking until the sugar fully dissolves.

muffins.title: Combine the mixtures!
muffins.instruction: Pour the brown sugar mixture into the flour mixture
muffins.second_slot_label: Drag brown sugar mixture on top
muffins.hint: Press and drag the pouring bowl across →
muffins.feedback_wrong: Keep pouring across the whole bowl.

muffins.title: Slice the apples!
muffins.instruction: Drag the apples onto the cutting board, then slice them with the knife.
muffins.hint: Drag the apples onto the cutting board

muffins.title: Fold the apples into the batter!
muffins.instruction: Pour the sliced apples into the brown sugar mixture
muffins.hint: Move the apples left and right ← → to fold them in
muffins.feedback_correct: Nice — the apples are folded into the batter!
muffins.feedback_wrong: Keep pouring across the whole bowl.

muffins.title: Whip up the final batter!
muffins.instruction: Fold everything together until the batter is smooth
muffins.hint: Move the spatula left and right ← → to fold
muffins.feedback_correct: Perfect — the batter is smooth and ready!
muffins.feedback_wrong: Keep folding until the batter is smooth.

muffins.title: Fill the muffin tin!
muffins.instruction: Set up your cook station, then scoop the batter in.
muffins.tray_slot_label: Drag muffin tray here from aside
muffins.batter_slot_label: Drag batter mixture here from aside
muffins.hint: Drag the muffin tray and the batter into the cook station.

muffins.title: Make the topping!
muffins.instruction: Drag the correct ingredients into the bowl
muffins.hint: Think small amounts — this is a crumble, not a batter.
muffins.feedback_wrong: Not quite — think crumble, not batter.

missing_hints.topping_brown_sugar: Hint: you're missing the sweet base of the crumble.
missing_hints.topping_flour: Hint: you're missing the dry powder that binds it together.
missing_hints.topping_butter: Hint: you're missing the fat that makes it crumbly.
missing_hints.cinnamon: Hint: you're missing the warm spice that ties it all together.

muffins.title: Mix up the topping!
muffins.instruction: Stir everything together until the topping is crumbly
muffins.hint: Move the spoon left and right ← → to stir
muffins.feedback_correct: Perfect — the topping is nice and crumbly!
muffins.feedback_wrong: Keep stirring until the topping is crumbly.

muffins.title: Top the muffins!
muffins.instruction: Sprinkle the topping across the whole tray
muffins.hint: Drag the topping left and right ← → to sprinkle across the tray.
muffins.feedback_correct: Crumbly and delicious — ready to bake!
muffins.feedback_wrong: Keep dragging until the whole tray is topped.

muffins.title: Bake the muffins!
muffins.instruction: Drag the oven into the center, then open the door
muffins.post_open_tooltip_tray: Drag muffin tray to the oven
muffins.hint: Drag the handle to swing the oven door open.
muffins.feedback_correct: Door closed — now let them bake!
muffins.feedback_wrong: Keep pulling — open the door all the way.

muffins.title: Cool the muffins!
muffins.instruction: Open the oven, then move the tray to the cooling rack
muffins.post_open_tooltip_transfer: Drag the muffin tray to cool →
muffins.hint: Pull the oven door down, then drag the tray to the cooling rack.
muffins.plate_muffin_tooltip: Drag a muffin from tray to plate it

casserole.title: Preheat the oven!
casserole.instruction: Drag the slider to set the correct temp
casserole.hint: It is the coolest baking temp on this slider.
casserole.feedback_wrong: Not quite! Pick the lowest baking temperature here.

casserole.title: Make the cream mixture!
casserole.instruction: Drag the correct ingredients into the bowl
casserole.drop_placeholder: Drag ingredients here for cream mixture
casserole.hint: Think creamy — soup, dairy, and the seasoning trio.
casserole.feedback_correct: Perfect — soup, cheeses, sour cream, and the seasonings are all in!
casserole.feedback_wrong: Almost! Check what goes in the cream base.

missing_hints.cream_soup: Hint: you're missing the canned soup that makes the base creamy.
missing_hints.cottage_cheese: Hint: you're missing a lumpy white cheese that adds body.
missing_hints.sour_cream: Hint: you're missing the tangy white dairy that smooths everything out.
missing_hints.cream_cheese: Hint: you're missing the soft spreadable cheese (4 oz, room temp).
missing_hints.onion_powder: Hint: you're missing a dry allium powder — savory, no chopping.
missing_hints.seasoning: Hint: you're missing the spicy red-pepper blend from Louisiana.
missing_hints.garlic_powder: Hint: you're missing the garlicky dry spice.

casserole.title: Whip up the cream mixture!
casserole.instruction: Stir everything together until smooth and creamy
casserole.hint: Move the spatula left and right ← → to mix
casserole.feedback_correct: Perfect — the cream mixture is smooth and ready!
casserole.feedback_wrong: Keep stirring until the mixture is smooth.

casserole.title: Add the chicken!
casserole.instruction: Drag the chicken and parsley into the cream mixture
casserole.hint: This step needs the main protein and the fresh green herb.
casserole.feedback_correct: Great — the chicken is coated and ready!
casserole.feedback_wrong: Think protein plus parsley for this step.

missing_hints.chicken: Hint: you're missing the pulled chicken.
missing_hints.parsley: Hint: you're missing the leafy herb that gets folded in.

casserole.title: Make the cracker topping!
casserole.instruction: Drag the topping ingredients into the bowl
casserole.hint: The topping is crunchy crackers plus butter and a little garlic powder.
casserole.feedback_correct: Yes — that's the crunchy cracker topping!
casserole.feedback_wrong: Not quite — build the crunchy topping, not the filling.

missing_hints.crackers: Hint: you're missing the crunchy base.
missing_hints.butter: Hint: you're missing the melted fat that holds the crumbs together.
missing_hints.topping_garlic_powder: Hint: you're missing the extra garlic powder for the topping.

casserole.title: Assemble the casserole!
casserole.instruction: Drag the chicken mixture, mozzarella, and cracker topping into the baking dish
casserole.drop_placeholder: Drag layers into the baking dish
casserole.hint: Layer the filling first, then cheese, then the cracker topping.
casserole.feedback_correct: Layered and ready for the oven!
casserole.feedback_wrong: Think casserole layers: filling, cheese, then topping.

missing_hints.chicken_mixture: Hint: start with the prepared chicken mixture.
missing_hints.mozzarella: Hint: add the shredded cheese layer.
missing_hints.cracker_topping: Hint: finish with the crunchy cracker topping.

casserole.title: Bake the casserole!
casserole.instruction: Watch the clock — hit STOP when it reaches about 35 minutes!
casserole.hint: The recipe says about 35 minutes. Stop between 33 and 37 minutes.
casserole.feedback_correct: Perfect bake — golden, bubbly, and ready to serve!
casserole.feedback_wrong_early: Too soon — the casserole needs more time to get bubbly.
casserole.feedback_wrong_late: Too long — the crackers may burn.

casserole.title: Serve and garnish!
casserole.instruction: Drag the scallions onto the casserole
casserole.hint: The final garnish is the green onion/scallion topping.
casserole.feedback_correct: Casserole complete — ready for lunch or dinner!
casserole.feedback_wrong: Only the scallions go on at the end.

missing_hints.scallions: Hint: garnish with the green onions.

fajitas.title: Preheat the oven!
fajitas.instruction: Drag the slider to set the correct temp
fajitas.hint: This one is hotter than the muffin oven.

fajitas.title: Make the marinade!
fajitas.instruction: Drag the correct ingredients into the bag
fajitas.hint: The marinade is all the spices + oil — not the fresh stuff!
fajitas.feedback_correct: Great marinade — now let it sit!
fajitas.feedback_wrong: Think spices and oil only for the marinade.

fajitas.title: Load the marinade bag!
fajitas.instruction: Drag the chicken, peppers, and onion into the bag
fajitas.drop_placeholder: Drag ingredients into the marinade bag

missing_hints.chicken_breast: The main protein goes in — look for the chicken.
missing_hints.pepper_blend: The colorful veggies need to soak in the marinade too.
missing_hints.yellow_onion: Don't forget the onion — it adds sweetness.

fajitas.hint: The fresh stuff goes in — the chicken, the peppers, and the onion.
fajitas.feedback_correct: Everything's in the bag — now let it marinate!
fajitas.feedback_wrong: Think fresh proteins and veggies — not the dry spices.

fajitas.title: Spread on the sheet pan!
fajitas.instruction: Hold and drag right to spread the marinated fajitas across the pan
fajitas.hint: Hold and drag rightward to spread everything across the pan →
fajitas.feedback_correct: Nicely spread — into the oven it goes!

fajitas.title: Let it roast!
fajitas.instruction: Watch the clock — hit STOP at EXACTLY 16 minutes!
fajitas.hint: Press START, watch the clock, and hit STOP at exactly 16 minutes.
fajitas.feedback_correct: Perfect roast! The chicken hits 165°F inside.
fajitas.feedback_wrong_early: Too soon — the chicken isn't cooked through yet!
fajitas.feedback_wrong_late: Too long! The veggies will get mushy.

fajitas.title: Finish it off!
fajitas.instruction: Drag the cilantro and lime onto the plate
fajitas.hint: Cilantro and lime go on last — drag both onto the plate.
fajitas.feedback_correct: Fajitas complete — fresh, bright, and delicious!
fajitas.feedback_wrong: Just the fresh garnish — cilantro and lime.
